_source: content/galaxy.json fortresses[] across 80 systems (6 found) + LOGH canon enrichment (Iserlohn=Thor Hammer 924m liquid-metal superlaser; Geiersburg=Imperial mobile fortress).
_schema_note: Pure canon content table consumed by the server fortress/entity builders. Stats are correct-by-construction from LOGH canon, independent of wire byte offsets. cannon_power/armor/antiaircraft/stamina/defense_outfit on a 0-1000 relative scale with Iserlohn as apex; garrison_capacity = canon stationed-fleet capacity (ship slots).
_ko_naming: System Korean readings sourced from content/names/systems-ko.json; fortress-name Korean readings are canon transliterations (not present in systems-ko.json).

fortresses._canon: 924m-class liquid-metal superlaser Thor Hammer; impregnable apex fortress guarding the Iserlohn Corridor. Cannon_name_en: Thor Hammer.
Imperial mobile fortress (engine-equipped, capable of relocation); deployed against Iserlohn during the Lippstadt-era campaigns.
Imperial fixed fortress of the Lippstadt War theatre, in the Freya system.
Imperial fixed fortress in the Kiffeuser system.
Free Planets Alliance fixed fortress in the Lofoten system.
Free Planets Alliance fixed fortress in the Polysun system; named in the tradition of the Dagon-era Alliance defenses.
